name: Widows' War
overview: Best friends Sam and George treat each other as sisters, but later on, their friendship is ruined. Both of them eventually find love, but unbeknownst to the two, they are marrying two men who belong to the same family, the Palacios.

trailers.title: Widows’ War: Magsisimula na ang paghahanap sa tunay na killer | FULL TRAILER
